claim.statement: Every 3-coloring of {1,...,27} contains a monochromatic 3-term arithmetic progression (van der Waerden W(3,3) <= 27).
claim.negation_of: a 3-coloring of {1,...,27} with no monochromatic 3-term arithmetic progression

rung.name: verified-checker-program
trusted_base: checkProofArr_unsat (Lean-proved sound: checkProofArr f steps = true -> Unsat f)

meta.format: flat space-separated DIMACS ints consumed by parseCert

encoder.variable_scheme: point-major, zero-based colors, one-based DIMACS variables

provenance.pipeline: glucose (DRAT) -> drat-trim (LRAT, s VERIFIED) -> flatten -> lratcheck

one_directional: checkProofArr_unsat (kernel-proved) guarantees lratcheck can never falsely certify a parsed CNF as UNSAT -- a bug only causes a refusal. The atlas binds the exact bytes by sha256, cross-checks parsed clause/step counts, and regenerates the W(3,3) CNF from the declared encoder spec to require an exact formula match. Tampering or encoder drift fails closed.
